title: 序幕 — 雨中霓虹天際線
prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a futuristic Asian city skyline at night, heavy rain falling, neon signs in pink and cyan reflecting off wet asphalt, towering skyscrapers with glowing windows, moody atmosphere, deep blue and purple tones, cinematic lighting, volumetric rain, wet lens effect, high detail, 8k resolution, cyberpunk aesthetic

title: 街角 — 霓虹倒影
prompt: Mid shot of a narrow alley in a neon-lit city at night, rain pouring down from dark sky, vibrant neon signs in magenta and electric blue reflecting in puddles on the street, steam rising from a manhole, wet cobblestone ground, cinematic composition, dramatic shadows, warm light spilling from a doorway, high contrast, film grain texture

title: 車流 — 雨夜燈流
prompt: Low angle shot looking up at a busy city intersection at night, rain streaking through headlight beams, trailing car light trails in red and white blurring through the frame, towering billboards with holographic ads, reflections dancing on wet road surface, cinematic depth of field, slow shutter effect, vibrant color palette, motion blur

title: 天橋 — 孤獨剪影
prompt: Cinematic shot from a pedestrian overpass overlooking a rain-soaked highway, city glow illuminating the night, silhouette of a lone figure with an umbrella in the foreground, distant skyscrapers fading into mist, rain creating ripples in puddles, neon reflections stretching across the wet asphalt, melancholic atmosphere, cool blue and warm orange contrast, anamorphic lens flare

title: 尾聲 — 城市的凝視
prompt: High angle establishing shot of a sprawling neon cityscape at night after rain begins to lighten, steam rising from wet streets, neon signs flickering in the distance, headlights cutting through the remaining drizzle, deep focus composition, cinematic color grading with teal and orange, atmospheric perspective, city lights twinkling like stars, peaceful yet electric mood, wide cinematic aspect ratio
